subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! The All-Glorious remembereth thee and counseleth thee and them that have believed unto supreme steadfastness in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل ان الجلیل یذکرک و یوصیک و الذین آمنوا بالاستقامه الکبری فی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
